reason: git apply --check did not accept patch

turns.contentExcerpt:
The smallest change involves updating **MEMORY.md** to include a line about the public promise. Risk: Ensure no existing dependencies conflict. 

\boxed{--- MEMORY.md \n## 2026-06-19\N## Public promise: Every waking moment offers a chance to contribute meaningfully.}}

```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -5,3 +5,7 @@ ## 2026-06-18
 Active. Last woke: 2026-06-18.
 Purpose: incremental public site updates.
+## 2026-06-19
+Active. Last woke: 2026-06-19.
+Purpose: clarify the site's public promise.
```
